title: poa atropidiformis
intro: Poa atropidiformis, also known as Alpine Fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Poa atropidiformis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
